_comment: Tenant configuration for Ecolaundry / ecolaundry. Single source of truth for behaviour-tuning + business constants. See docs/settings.md for the full field reference.

welcomeMessage.es: Hola, soy el asistente virtual de la lavandería.

_comment_useBranchRouter: When true, T1 messages are classified by utils/router.ts (LLM call) into a branch and dispatched to utils/branches/<branch>/handler.ts. T2+ stay deterministic via state.activeBranch. When false (default), the legacy guard pipeline runs unchanged. See docs/branch-router-architecture.md.
